sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39985" key="e)pilampa/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιλαμπάδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a surgical instrument used as a <sense id="n39985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trocar, Mulomed.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Chironis</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
